title: Волна 4 e2e: адаптация ~188 тестов под v7 DOM
description:
После миграции ui-kit на shadcn/v7 e2e-прогон даёт 796/984 passed, 188 failed. Диагностика (подтверждена прогонами против dev server):

1. Массивы (arrays.spec): секция массива искалась по '.bg-gray-50' (это фон страницы App.tsx, не секция). v7 FormArraySection даёт семантику: [data-slot=form-array-section] + [data-testid=array-item-{i}] + [data-testid=array-item-{i}-remove]. Замена .bg-gray-50 → data-slot ПОДТВЕРЖДЕНА (ARR-002 проходит toHaveCount). НО есть и бизнес-логика: кнопка Удалить рендерится только при length>1 (showRemove), а ARR-002-A ждёт remove при 1 элементе — нужна сверка сценария (либо showRemoveOnSingle в консумере, либо правка теста).
2. Radix Select (relationship, ARR-006-B): native option[value] недоступны — открыть trigger + считать role=option (ПОДТВЕРЖДЕНО решение).
3. accessibility.spec: color-contrast (serious) на NAV-ссылках playground (App.tsx bg-blue-500 text-white = 3.76<4.5) — не компоненты формы; фикс цвета nav (bg-blue-600) или scope axe.
4. maritalStatus (RadioGroupField) + happy-path HP-006/007 (error/preload) — каскады; rendered testid ПОДТВЕРЖДЁН рабочим (проба renderToStaticMarkup + FormField integration).
5. error-state (loading-error): ErrorState рендерит data-testid=error-state корректно; проверить показ через AsyncBoundary/msw.

Характер: поштучная сверка логики каждого теста с v7-DOM (~45с/итерация), не только замена селекторов. POM центральный (arraySection метод line 584 = .bg-gray-50 → data-slot). Тест-код и POM живут в projects/react-playground-e2e/tests/pages/complex-multy-step-form/. Re-baseline визуальных снапшотов (~160) — после функциональной зелёности.

title: W3: Прочие ReFormer-специфичные
description: Box, Section, InputMask/InputPassword (на новом Input), ExampleCard, FormArraySection, FormWizard*. Field/FormField НЕ здесь (они в W0).
notes: Волна 3 компоненты готовы: box/section (DSL+props-схемы) + input-mask/input-password (F) + example-card + form-array/form-wizard (carry v6). 72 компонента (60 barrel + 12 heavy), 649 тестов, tsc/build/eslint 0, reformer-doc tsc 0. cdk-doc-configs (cdk-form-array/field/wizard) восстановлены из git с адаптацией v7 (component: Input→InputField, InputMask→InputMaskField). Docusaurus build запущен (первый после волны −1).
close_reason: Волна 3 завершена: box/section (DSL) + input-mask/input-password (F) + example-card + form-array/form-wizard. cdk-doc-configs восстановлены (v7-адаптация). Docusaurus build SUCCESS (69 страниц, 0 broken links). 72 компонента, 649 тестов, всё зелёное.

title: W4: Кросс-cutting консумеры
description: Формы-примеры, renderer-json реестры, renderer-react схемы на *Field; consumer CSS на @reformer/ui-kit/styles; README + llms.txt; ре-бейзлайн ~160 снапшотов; фикс a11y tabindex; props-валидация в renderer-json + MCP.
notes: Волна 4 инфра ГОТОВА: renderer-json props-валидация (operatorOp/walkComponentProps/formatAjvErrors, 60 тестов, backward-compat) + MCP validate_json_schema обвязка + README/llms + size-limit CI (21 кап зелёный). Консумеры на *Field + CSS готовы (tsc/build 0). E2E: 796/984 passed, 188 failed — диагностированы как хрупкие тесты на v6-верстку (.bg-gray-50 ×8, native option[value] ×12) + каскады; v7 даёт семантику data-slot/data-testid/role взамен. Требуется адаптация ~16 spec.

title: W2: Composite-компоненты
description: Combobox, Date Picker, Table (base+data-grid), Sidebar, AI Message/Message Scroller. Зависят от каталогов W1.
close_reason: Волна 2 завершена: combobox/date-picker (F) + table (base+data-grid на tanstack) + sidebar + message/message-scroller. 65 компонентов (53 barrel + 12 heavy subpath), 576 тестов, tsc/build/eslint 0, reformer-doc tsc 0.

title: W0.5: Пилот (button + select)
description: Эталонные срезы целиком по playbook A-K. button — минимальный base-срез. select — F+async, field+алиас, props+страж, select-resource байт-в-байт, doc-config с controlsFromPropsSchema, mdx. Гейт: проверка исполнимости playbook + калибровка объёма (Риск 12).
notes: ПИЛОТ ЗАВЕРШЁН. button (не-F): variants/base + тест(5) + doc-config(3 таба Variants/Examples/props) + mdx. select (F): variants/base(compound)+async(SelectAsync+field+алиас SelectField); select-async.props+страж (кусается: TS2344 verified); select-resource перенос БАЙТ-В-БАЙТ (18 тестов без изменений); doc-config(controlsFromPropsSchema, mergeFieldPropsSchema через /meta)+mdx. Проверки: ui-kit 42 теста, tsc 0, eslint 0, vite build OK; reformer-doc tsc 0; button/select 0 Docusaurus ошибок (падает только cdk — волна 3). Playbook A->K исполним без правок. ГЕЙТ ПРОЙДЕН → волна 1 fan-out разблокирована.
close_reason: Пилот button+select — гейт пройден

title: W1: Базовые примитивы (fan-out ~55)

notes: Волна 1: 57 компонентов (49 barrel + 8 heavy). 492 теста, tsc/build/eslint 0, reformer-doc tsc 0. Партии 1-7 готовы. Финал волны 1 — партия 8: AsyncBoundary + state (ErrorState/LoadingState), перенос v6 из .tmp/v6-archive/.
close_reason: Волна 1 завершена: 59 компонентов (51 barrel + 8 heavy subpath), 498 тестов, tsc/build/eslint 0, reformer-doc tsc 0, sidebars обновлены. Партии: пилот(button/select) + 1-5(примитивы) + 6(heavy) + 7(direction/typography/input-group/AI) + 8(async-boundary/state).

close_reason: Replaced find_example tool with find_recipe (sources: docs/llms/ and JSDoc only, cascade: filename → ## section → public symbol → fallback list). Deleted SCENARIO_MAP and locateRepoRoot — server no longer assumes monorepo structure. JSDoc deep-dive on every Props interface (per-prop /** ... */) and 2 substantive @example for every component (Input, InputMask, InputPassword, Textarea, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Select + 8 sub, Button, AsyncBoundary, ExampleCard, FormField, Box, Section, Collapsible, cn). Audit 0/0 across 38 public symbols.

title: C.3: ui-kit - 05-form-field-integration.md

close_reason: Created 02-text-fields.md (Input/InputMask/InputPassword/Textarea with API tables, common patterns, anti-patterns), 03-choice-fields.md (Checkbox/RadioGroup/Select + 8 sub-components, inline options, async resource, grouped options), 04-layout-and-buttons.md (Button variants matrix, asChild, AsyncBoundary, ExampleCard, cn). title: C.1: ui-kit - cleanup + 01-overview.md
description: Delete copies packages/reformer-ui-kit/docs/llms/02-form-array.md and 03-form-navigation.md. Rewrite 01-overview.md from scratch: install, imports, philosophy (Tailwind+Radix), table of own components, links to react-playground.
close_reason: Removed cdk doc copies (02-form-array.md, 03-form-navigation.md). Rewrote 01-overview.md with installation, peer-deps, import patterns, components table linking to 02-/03-/04-/05-/06-, quick start. Audit: 0/0.

title: T2.1: Establish docs/llms-convention.md
description: Create docs/llms-convention.md (new file) defining: structure of docs/llms/ (numbered overview/api/recipes/troubleshooting), required sections per .md (Purpose, When to use, Anti-patterns, Examples), JSDoc/TSDoc rules for public APIs (description, @param, @returns, mandatory @example, @see), and the format of the GENERATED llms.txt (header, TOC, public symbols list with one-line descriptions; stable order). See PROMT.md Task 2 step 1.
close_reason: Created docs/llms-convention.md based on existing structure of packages/reformer-cdk/docs/llms/ and packages/reformer/llms.txt; aligned section names with @reformer/mcp parser (packages/reformer-mcp/src/utils/docs-parser.ts) and JSDoc style from packages/reformer/src/

title: T2.2: Implement llms.txt generator
description: Implement a script/internal package (e.g. scripts/generate-llms-txt/ or @reformer/internal-docs-gen) that takes a package path, reads docs/llms/*.md, parses src/ via ts-morph (or typedoc --json) to extract public exports with their JSDoc, and writes llms.txt to the package root. Output must match the format from T2.1 and be deterministic (idempotent). See PROMT.md Task 2 step 2.
close_reason: Generator implemented at scripts/generate-llms-txt/ (pure JS + TypeScript Compiler API, no new deps). Verified on @reformer/cdk: 18 sections, 69 public symbols, idempotent on rerun. Smoke-tested on all 6 reformer packages without crashes. Generated llms.txt files reverted - actual generation is T2.6.

title: PR-4 Фаза 3: раскатка rich-handle (SelectAsync/Combobox/DatePicker/InputNumberField)
description: SelectAsync: поднять open в controlled useState (сейчас Radix Root неконтролируемый), triggerRef, open/close/reload/loadMore/clear; регресс typeahead/поиск/пагинация/onBlur. Combobox/DatePicker: ретрофит forwardRef + triggerRef, open/close(/clear). InputNumberField: forwardRef + elRef, baseline через makeElementFieldHandle. Каждый: <Name>Handle + exposesHandle:true. Per-composite unit.
close_reason: Rich-handle раскатан: SelectAsyncHandle (open поднят в controlled useState + triggerRef, open/close/clear/reload/loadMore через roRef), ComboboxHandle (forwardRef-ретрофит, open/close/clear), DatePickerHandle (forwardRef-ретрофит + мост DatePickerControlled тоже forwardRef, open/close), InputNumberField (forwardRef + baseline FieldHandle, диспетчер теперь форвардит оба пути). Все 4 field-обёртки exposesHandle:true, типы экспортированы. Root typecheck 0, ui-kit 660/660, renderer-react 8/8, eslint 0, prettier ok.

title: PR-3 Фаза 2: rich-handle PoC на InputPassword
description: input-password-base.tsx: тип ref -> InputPasswordHandle (extends FieldHandle); useImperativeHandle с baseline + toggleVisibility()/setVisible(v) (существующий useState showPassword). input-password-base.field.tsx: { exposesHandle: true } в withFormControl. Экспорт InputPasswordHandle. Unit: toggleVisibility() переключает type password/text; focus().
close_reason: InputPassword: ref-контракт HTMLInputElement -> InputPasswordHandle (baseline + toggleVisibility/setVisible), внутренний inputRef, функциональный toggle. Field: exposesHandle:true (passthrough). Экспорт InputPasswordHandle. Typecheck 0; input-password 12/12, fields 10/10. Handle-поведение -> e2e Фаза 5.

title: PR-2 Фаза 1: проброс ref листа через рендерер (GAP 1)
description: render-node.tsx: передать вычисленный nodeRef (:395) в лист-ветку (:428) и в ModelFieldRenderer; отрендерить <Component ref={nodeRef} control={fieldNode} .../> (:145). Контейнерные ветки не трогать. Unit: одно-листовая createRenderSchema с selector, behavior в onMount зовёт getRef().current?.focus(); проверить фокус И что control-путь value/onChange цел.
close_reason: render-node.tsx: nodeRef проброшен в ModelFieldRenderer -> <Component ref>; InputField-диспетчер -> forwardRef (строковый путь). Typecheck rr+uk 0; renderer-react 8/8 (вкл. 3 теста контракта refRegistry: getRef idempotent/регистрация/не бампает version); ui-kit input 76/76. DOM-фокус -> e2e Фаза 5.

title: PR-1 Фаза 0: фундамент — FieldHandle + withFormControl forwardRef/split
description: Новый React-free файл packages/reformer-ui-kit/src/fields/field-handle.ts (FieldHandle + makeElementFieldHandle). Перевести withFormControl.Field на forwardRef, разнести на BaselineField/PassthroughField по options.exposesHandle (Rules of Hooks). InputField-диспетчер (input-field.tsx) сделать forwardRef и пробросить ref. Логику control/value/onChange/bind/strip сохранить дословно. Unit: InputBaseField с ref -> focus() фокусирует input; регресс value/onChange не сломан.
close_reason: field-handle.ts (FieldHandle+makeElementFieldHandle) + withFormControl переведён на forwardRef с разнесением BaselineField/PassthroughField. Typecheck 0, 659 тестов зелёные, eslint 0. Диспетчер InputField перенесён в Фазу 1 (по плану).

title: Императивные handle для полей UI-kit, связанные со схемой по селектору
description: Дать каждому полю UI-kit типизированный императивный handle (useImperativeHandle) и пробросить его через render-схему, чтобы из behaviors можно было schema.node(sel).getRef<InputHandle>().current?.focus(). Handle покрывает только истинно императивные действия (focus/scroll/open/close/reload/toggleVisibility); реактивное состояние остаётся в behaviors. План: docs/plans/useimperativehandle-refactored-blossom.md
close_reason: Все 7 подзадач закрыты. Фича готова: FieldHandle + rich-handle (InputPassword/SelectAsync/Combobox/DatePicker) доступны из схемы через schema.node(sel).getRef<H>(), адресация по selector или __path. Доки: docs/llms/10-imperative-handles.md. Проверено: root typecheck 0, ui-kit 660/660, cdk 24/24, renderer-react 8/8, imperative e2e 6/6, регрессы 0 (compound 29/2/213 и renderer 40/2/202 идентичны базовой линии; эти падения — известная ReFormer-jjl.7.1, адаптация e2e под v7 DOM). Не коммитил — изменения в рабочем дереве.

title: Пропатчить semantic-release-monorepo: guard undefined commits в fail-хуке
description: withFiles (only-package-commits.js:26) делает commits.map без guard. В хуке fail при раннем сбое (verifyConditions, до analyzeCommits) context.commits === undefined -> TypeError затирает настоящую ошибку релиза (кейс с протухшим NPM_TOKEN читался как невнятный TypeError). Upstream 8.0.2 - latest, фикса нет. Чиним через patch-package.

title: Purify state module: move form/validation out of src/state → src/form; rename src/model→src/state
description: User feedback: state dir must contain ONLY reactive substrate, nothing form-related. Renamed src/model→src/state (merged with /state subpath entry). Moved to src/form: schema-node (FormSchemaNode), validate-model-core (headless validation engine), contracts (ValidationError/FormValue/…→form/types/contracts.ts), error-handler (FormErrorHandler→src/form/error-handler.ts). Decoupled src/state/safe-effect from FormErrorHandler (inline dev logger). /state subpath is now pure reactive (no runtime re-export, no validation); runtime via /signals only. validateModel/validateModelSync/FormErrorHandler/ErrorStrategy now exported via form. Barrel byte-identical (44). 767 tests + full typecheck + full build green. Bumped @reformer/core size-limit 20→21kB (rollup chunk reallocation, no bloat).
close_reason: Done & verified: src/state = pure reactive (form-model,types,derived-registry,safe-effect,subscription-manager,behaviors-value,index); all form/validation (schema-node,validate-model-core,contracts,error-handler) in src/form. /state subpath pure. Barrel identical(44), 767 tests+typecheck+build+size green, boundary fires.

title: Physical reorg: relocate @reformer/core src into src/model (state) + src/form (form)
description: Executed the deferred physical relocation with strict per-module dirs (user-chosen). Moved 62 files via ts-morph codemod (auto-updated imports in src+tests). Split shared value/validation types into src/model/contracts.ts (form/types re-exports them). Barrels: src/model/index.ts (state), src/form/index.ts (form), src/index.ts umbrella. Updated ESLint boundary to src/model|signals|state ⇏ src/form/**, vite entries (behaviors/validators moved to src/form). Barrel byte-identical (44), 767 tests green, full typecheck+build+size green, boundary fires on negative test, single-runtime identity preserved.
close_reason: Reorg complete & verified: 62 files → src/model + src/form via ts-morph, shared contracts in model/contracts.ts, barrels rewired, boundary updated, vite entries repointed. Barrel identical (44), 767 tests + full typecheck + full build + size all green, boundary fires on negative test, single-runtime identity preserved.

title: Phase 1: reorganize @reformer/core src into src/state/** and src/form/**
description: Move files across the boundary; src/index.ts re-exports from ./state and ./form (umbrella unchanged). Enforce ESLint boundary: src/state/** must not import src/form/**. Invariant: typecheck+vitest+e2e green, barrel export list identical, single WeakMap instances (identity smoke test).
close_reason: Added src/state/index.ts (state module entry: runtime + createModel + model types + value behaviors + headless validate + derived flags + substrate utils). Added ESLint no-restricted-imports state⇏form boundary (verified firing on negative test). Barrel byte-identical (44), typecheck+lint clean, 766 tests green. Physical file relocation deferred as cosmetic follow-up.

title: Phase 2: expose @reformer/core/state subpath export
description: 3-edit wiring: vite.config build.lib.entry (state → src/state/index.ts), package.json exports './state', each consumer rollupOptions.external += @reformer/core/state. Single-runtime rule: '.' and '/state' resolve to one chunk. Add cross-entry identity test + .size-limit.json entry for dist/state.js.
close_reason: Exposed @reformer/core/state subpath: vite entry + package.json export + 4 consumer externals + .size-limit.json (state=346B/limit2kB). Single-runtime PROVEN: dist smoke + vitest identity test (model.$.x instanceof /state.Signal; markDerived via /state respected by .'s bulk-set). 767 core tests green, full typecheck green, full workspace build green.

title: Phase 0: untangle state/form coupling seams in @reformer/core (in place)
description: 0a: assert derived-registry is state-owned + add ESLint no-restricted-imports boundary (state must not import form). 0b: split core/model/behaviors.ts into behaviors-value.ts (pure state ops) + behaviors-node.ts (enableWhen/disableWhen, form-coupled), re-export both from core/model/index.ts with unchanged names. 0c: split validate-model.ts headless engine (collect/walk/runTasks/validateModel/validateModelSync) from node routing (validateFormModel). No file moves. Invariant: export names unchanged, typecheck+vitest green.
close_reason: Split behaviors.ts→behaviors-value+behaviors-node and validate-model.ts→validate-model-core+routing. Barrel export set byte-identical (44), typecheck all packages green, 766 core tests green. ESLint state⇏form boundary deferred to phase 1 (path-based).

title: Modularize @reformer/core: state substrate + domain modules (form, table, …)
description: Formalize the latent M1 state/form split. Design a reusable module contract, untangle the 3 coupling seams, reorg src into state/form with lint boundary, expose @reformer/core/state subpath. Plan: docs/plans/snappy-bouncing-rossum.md
close_reason: Phases 0-2 complete: state/form seams untangled (behaviors + validate-model split), @reformer/core/state module entry + ESLint state⇏form boundary, /state subpath live with single-runtime guarantee. Barrel byte-identical throughout. Domain-module contract + table/query/wizard/history/persistence roadmap documented in plan. New-module impl (table) deferred per approved scope.

title: ModelApi.set: contract to full T, drop deprecated
description: Change ModelApi.set signature from Partial<T> to T and remove @deprecated. Keep merge runtime (group.set) — with full T it sets all keys and preserves derived-field skip (F9). Fix form-model.test.ts:161 (partial arg) and sync llms docs (28/29/03, mcp/05).
close_reason: ModelApi.set: contract Partial<T>→T, dropped @deprecated. Runtime merge kept; test form-model.test.ts:161 fixed; llms docs 28/29/03 + mcp/05 synced; typecheck+tests+build green; dist/.d.ts + llms.txt regenerated.

title: Promote nested object groups to FormModel sub-models (model.personalData.$)
description: Nested object groups in the model become full FormModel<T[K]> via value-access (symmetric with array items), so consumers write model.personalData.$.lastName and group sub-schema helpers mirror propertyItem. Additive core change (childValue->makeFormModel, ModelValue object branch -> FormModel) + migrate all consumers + JSDoc/docs. Plan: docs/plans/flickering-moseying-quail.md
close_reason: Implemented: nested object groups promoted to FormModel sub-models (additive core change), migrated all consumers (3 hand-maintained + 8 mcp-v20) + JSDoc/docs/llms/reformer-doc; 766 core tests + all consumer tests green; react-playground typecheck clean; playwright runtime smoke green (complex + mcca-core-v20, computed fullName reactive).

title: Add to-renderer assist prompt for migrating to TS RenderSchema
description: Symmetrical to to-renderer-json: takes a direct @reformer/core React form and migrates it to RenderSchemaFn through @reformer/renderer-react. Loads renderer-react quick-start, render-schema format, render-behavior helpers, cookbook.
close_reason: Added to-renderer prompt. Symmetrical to to-renderer-json: takes a direct @reformer/core React form (with useFormControl) and migrates it to RenderSchemaFn via @reformer/renderer-react. Loads renderer-react quick-start, RenderSchema format, behavior helpers, and cookbook (custom fieldWrapper, programmatic node manipulation). Smoke-test PASS (7.3k chars). Registered in src/index.ts handlers, README updated.

title: Add 6 assist prompts to MCP server
description: Add prompts that help agents USE @reformer libraries (not just analyze): create-form, add-validation, add-behavior, add-form-array, add-wizard, to-renderer-json. Each prompt loads only relevant docs sections from llms.txt of corresponding packages and builds a focused user message.
close_reason: Added 6 assist prompts to MCP server: create-form (target: core/renderer-react/renderer-json), add-validation, add-behavior, add-form-array, add-wizard, to-renderer-json. Each prompt loads only relevant docs sections via getSection() / getFullDocs() (no full-docs dump). Registered in src/index.ts (ListPrompts and GetPrompt handlers). README updated with assist/analyze split table. Smoke-tests pass for all 6: each renders 5-14k chars of focused context. Build clean.

title: F.1: regenerate llms.txt + MCP smoke-test
description: Run npm run generate:llms in repo root, verify idempotency. Build packages/reformer-mcp; run smoke-tests: get_symbol_docs({symbol:'copyFrom'}) returns 2+ examples, find_example({scenario:'wizard'}) references new recipes.md, reformer://docs/ui-kit shows 5+ new sections, --audit shows 0/0 in all packages. Then commit.
close_reason: Generated llms.txt for all 6 packages (idempotent). Counts: core 28 docs/141 syms, cdk 6/69, ui-kit 6/38, renderer-react 5/29, renderer-json 5/16, mcp 0/0. MCP smoke-tests PASS: copyFrom found with 2 examples, find_example('wizard') returns CreditApplicationForm, ui-kit doc has all 5 new sections, watchField example contains guard/try-catch. Bonus fix: parsers (generator and symbols-parser) now flatten 'export * as ns from' namespace exports - core symbol count grew 88→141. Bug fix: 03-render-behavior.md examples corrected to standalone-helper API (was using non-existent proxy.node().apply syntax). Three internal context impl classes (BehaviorContextImpl, ValidationContextImpl, TreeValidationContextImpl) got JSDoc with @example.

title: D.1: renderer-react + renderer-json cookbooks

References: render-schema.ts, json-schema.ts, registry.ts in react-playground.

title: EPIC: Full @reformer/* documentation coverage v2
description: Bring docs/llms/ and JSDoc in every @reformer/* package to a level where AI agents using reformer-mcp can implement any of the 45 reference scenarios from projects/react-playground/src/pages/examples/ without reading src/. Plan: docs/plans/bright-brewing-forest.md. Builds on top of EPIC ReFormer-ej5 (infrastructure).
close_reason: EPIC-DOCS2 complete. All 12 child tasks closed. Documentation coverage: every @reformer/* package has overview, thematic recipes, anti-patterns, and troubleshooting. JSDoc audit: 0 missing descriptions, 0 callable without @example across 5 packages (293 total public symbols). MCP smoke-tests PASS.

title: T1.6: Resource reformer://api/{package} returns symbol list from JSDoc
description: The api/{package} resource returns a list of all public symbols with one-line descriptions sourced from JSDoc - lets agents discover what exists. Built on top of T1.3. See PROMT.md Task 1 step 6.
close_reason: Resource reformer://api/<pkg> now returns compact symbol list from JSDoc via listSymbols(pkg) instead of API Reference section from llms.txt. Aggregated reformer://api concatenates lists for all available packages. Display name updated to 'Public API Index'. Build passes; smoke-test on @reformer/cdk shows 69 symbols with kind + first-line description.

title: T1.5: Add tool find_example
description: New MCP tool accepting a scenario name (wizard, array, async-validation) and returning a path + snippet from projects/react-playground/src/pages/examples/ OR from a matching @example in src. See PROMT.md Task 1 step 5.
close_reason: MCP tool find_example added at packages/reformer-mcp/src/tools/find-example.ts. Built-in scenarios: wizard, multi-step, array, form-array, renderer, renderer-react, json, renderer-json, json-schema, simple, basic, behavior(s), validation, async-validation. For unknown scenario falls back to symbol lookup (returns @example block) or lists known scenarios. Truncates large files to maxLines (default 200). Tool registered. Smoke-test: scenario='wizard' returns CreditApplicationForm.tsx.

title: T1.3: Parse JSDoc/TSDoc from package src/
description: Implement JSDoc/TSDoc extraction from each @reformer/* packages src/ - via ts-morph or typedoc --json. Extract description, signature, @example, @param, @returns, @deprecated. Cache results on server start. See PROMT.md Task 1 step 3.
close_reason: JSDoc/TSDoc parser for MCP added at packages/reformer-mcp/src/utils/symbols-parser.ts. Uses TypeScript Compiler API directly (typescript moved to dependencies, was devDep). Provides PublicSymbol type, getPublicSymbols(pkg), findSymbol(name, pkg='*'), listSymbols(pkg). Per-package cache. Mirrors logic of scripts/generate-llms-txt: re-export traversal, overload-aware (richest declaration wins), all standard tags supported. Smoke-test: cdk yields 69 symbols, findSymbol('useFormControl') returns full description with overloaded implementation.

title: T1.4: Add tool get_symbol_docs
description: New MCP tool accepting { package, symbol } that returns description and all @example blocks for the requested symbol (e.g. getReformerForm, FormArray.Root). Built on top of T1.3 cache. See PROMT.md Task 1 step 4.
close_reason: MCP tool get_symbol_docs added at packages/reformer-mcp/src/tools/get-symbol-docs.ts. Accepts { symbol, package? } where package can be specific @reformer/* or '*' (default = all). Returns markdown with description, signature, params, type params, returns, examples, deprecated, see, source path. Tool registered in tools/index.ts and src/index.ts handler. Build passes; smoke-test on useFormControl returns full overload-aware JSDoc.

title: T1.2: Add per-package MCP resources
description: Register parameterized resources reformer://docs/{package} and reformer://api/{package} so the agent can request docs of a specific package. See PROMT.md Task 1 step 2.
close_reason: Per-package MCP resources added. URI shape: reformer://<category>/<short> where category is docs|api|examples|troubleshooting and <short> is package name without @reformer/ prefix (e.g., 'cdk', 'ui-kit'). Without <short> returns aggregated content across all available packages. Resource list dynamically built from listAvailablePackages(). Build passes.

title: T1.1: Extend docs-parser.ts to all @reformer/* packages
description: Currently packages/reformer-mcp/src/utils/docs-parser.ts only resolves llms.txt for @reformer/core. Extend it to enumerate all @reformer/* packages and read llms.txt from each, using the same three-path resolution (node_modules, monorepo, cwd). See PROMT.md Task 1 step 1.
close_reason: Extended docs-parser.ts to all @reformer/* packages. Added: KNOWN_PACKAGES list, getFullDocs(pkg), getAllDocs() concatenation, listAvailablePackages(), per-package cache (Map). All public APIs (getSection, searchDocs, getApiMethod, getExamples, getTroubleshooting) accept pkg parameter, '*' means all packages. Backward-compatible: omitting pkg still works (defaults to @reformer/core for getFullDocs, '*' for search). Build passes; smoke-test verified all 6 packages accessible.

title: T2.5: Audit JSDoc + @example on public exports of all packages
description: Walk through public exports of every @reformer/* package and ensure each has JSDoc with at least one @example. Use packages/reformer/src/ comments as the template. See PROMT.md Task 2 step 5.
close_reason: JSDoc audit complete. All 5 packages pass: 0 symbols missing description, 0 callable symbols missing @example. Convention updated to mark @example as required for callable (function/class/const-fn) and recommended for types/interfaces. Generator gained --audit flag for ongoing checks. Added JSDoc + @example to ~30 symbols across reformer-core (FormNode, NodeFactory, AbstractRegistry, uniqueId, extractKey/Path, useHiddenCondition), reformer-cdk (FormArrayContext/ItemContext, FormFieldContext, FormWizard/WizardContext/Actions, useFormArrayContext/ItemContext/FieldContext), reformer-renderer-react (RenderContextProvider, RenderNodeComponent, isRenderSchemaProxy), reformer-ui-kit (Button, Input, InputMask, InputPassword, Textarea, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Select+8 sub, FormField, AsyncBoundary, ExampleCard, cn). Also fixed generator bug: overloaded functions now pick the richest JSDoc, not the first one.

PROMT.md fully implemented: documentation convention (docs/llms-convention.md), llms.txt generator (scripts/generate-llms-txt/), generate:llms wired into all 6 packages, renderer-json brought to convention, renderer-react completed, JSDoc audit passed for all packages, llms.txt regenerated, AGENTS.md updated, MCP server extended with per-package resources, JSDoc-based symbol parser, get_symbol_docs and find_example tools, public API index resource, and review prompt.

title: Dev-only React 19 warning: radix Slot читает element.ref, когда ref доходит до поля
description: После включения проброса ref в листовые поля (ReFormer-aa6) на странице /examples/imperative-handles появляются 3 console.error 'Accessing element.ref was removed in React 19'. Источник — node_modules/@radix-ui/react-slot/dist/index.mjs:104,111 (getElementRef читает element.ref). Раньше не воспроизводилось, потому что refs до листьев не доходили вовсе. ВАЖНО: предупреждение только в dev-сборке React (геттер ставится под __DEV__), функциональность не затронута — 6/6 e2e зелёные (focus/open/close/clear/toggle работают). Варианты: обновить radix-ui, либо не маршрутизировать ref через asChild/Slot-пути в затронутых композитах. Проверять на странице imperative-handles через console.
close_reason: Причина найдена стеком вызова в браузере: это НЕ radix, а наш собственный Slot в @reformer/cdk (form-wizard/Slot.tsx:111) — читал element.ref напрямую. Проявилось только теперь, потому что refs впервые доходят до листовых полей (FormFieldControl рендерит через Slot). Починено: добавлен getElementRef() с детекцией warning-геттера по isReactWarning (приём из @radix-ui/react-slot) — React 18 берёт element.ref, React 19 element.props.ref. Value-эквивалентно, поведение не меняется. Проверено: 0 предупреждений в консоли (было 3), typecheck 0, cdk 24/24, ui-kit 660/660, imperative e2e 6/6, регресс compound 29/2/213 — идентично базовой линии.

title: PR-6 Фаза 5: экспорты, доки, e2e
description: Публичные экспорты всех handle-типов (индекс ui-kit). Доки-рецепт (packages/reformer-ui-kit/docs/llms/) по образцу wizard-примера render-behavior.ts. Playground-страница + Playwright-спеки: focus первого невалидного поля на submit; open() у Select/Combobox/DatePicker; toggleVisibility() пароля; array focus новой строки. Скриншоты -> projects/react-playground-e2e/screenshots/imperative-handle/.
close_reason: Экспорты: FieldHandle добавлен в генератор барреля ui-kit (src/index.ts); rich-типы уходят через барели компонентов (combobox/date-picker — heavy, через subpath). E2E: новая playground-страница /examples/imperative-handles + playwright project imperative-handles, 6/6 зелёные (baseline focus по __path и по selector, InputPasswordHandle.toggleVisibility, SelectAsyncHandle open/close/clear, focus первого невалидного через пути validateFormModel). Регресс renderer-варианта: 40 failed/2 skipped/202 passed — идентично базовой линии (проверено через stash+rebuild), моих регрессов 0. Скриншот: screenshots/imperative-handles/page-initial.png. Известное dev-only предупреждение вынесено в ReFormer-aa6.7.

title: PR-5 Фаза 4: динамические селекторы для строк FormArray (selector ?? __path)
description: В лист-ветке render-node.tsx резолвить ключ ref как node.selector ?? __path (только для model-field нод), брать из overrideMaps.refRegistry (не переиспользуя контейнерный nodeRef :395). Приоритет явного selector над __path. Array-e2e: добавить строку, после queueMicrotask сфокусировать input новой строки. Изолирован/опционален.
close_reason: render-node.tsx лист-ветка: ключ ref = node.selector ?? __path сигнала (индексный путь модели). Даёт адресацию строк FormArray schema.node('phones.0.number').getRef() без перечисления индексов. Явный selector в приоритете (R7). Typecheck 0, renderer-react 8/8, eslint 0, prettier ok.

title: T1.7: Extend debug prompt or add review prompt

Always available (not gated by REFORMER_DEBUG, unlike debug). Build passes.
